original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求多添加一点元素充实画面，文案：玄墨凝瑞，静心绕腕  黑曜澄明养心性
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, New Chinese Style Zen aesthetic. A beaded bracelet composed primarily of polished spherical black beads arranged in a continuous circular loop. The uniform black sequence is interrupted by two distinct accent beads placed side-by-side: a smooth translucent peachy-orange agate bead and an ornate antique bronze metal bead with floral relief and teal enamel. The bracelet rests on a textured dark slate stone surface (creating material contrast with the glossy beads). 
[Props]: To enrich the scene, background includes a blurred artistic arrangement of dried pine branches or bamboo leaves (symbolizing longevity) and faint, swirling incense smoke (adding spirituality). A small antique ceramic cup is faintly visible in the far background depth.
[Background]: Deep charcoal grey gradient with soft focused shadows, evoking a quiet study or meditation room.
Lighting is Commercial Studio Lighting with strong rim lights to separate the black beads from the dark background, highlighting the glossy reflection of the obsidian and the translucency of the peach agate.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Left-Aligned Vertical or Horizontal Flow.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast Gold or White):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “玄墨凝瑞，静心绕腕”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [Elegant Calligraphy-style Serif, Metallic Gold texture, 3D embossed effect].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “黑曜澄明养心性”. Style: [Clean Sans-serif, White, smaller size, tracking widely spaced].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “甄选黑曜”. Style: [Vertical rectangular seal stamp style in Red].
layout_logic: Due to the product being primarily black (Obsidian), placing it on a pure black background risks losing the product. I have suggested a 'Dark Slate/Texture' surface and 'Rim Lighting' to ensure the black beads pop out. The 'More Elements' request is handled by adding Zen props (Pine branch, Incense smoke) which fill the negative space without stealing focus. Text color is set to Gold/White to ensure readability against the dark environment.
